chunks.title: Accession of Jehoram
chunks.reason: Narrative covering the death of Jehoshaphat and the rise of his son Jehoram.

chunks.title: Jehoram's Evil Reign
chunks.reason: Description of Jehoram's wicked actions and the resulting political revolts.

chunks.title: Oracle from Elijah
chunks.reason: A prophetic letter containing a divine judgment against Jehoram.

chunks.title: Judgment and Death of Jehoram
chunks.reason: Account of the invasion by enemies, the sickness, and the king's final days.
